titlestmt.titleproper: Arthur S. Leonards Gay Games and Stonewall 25 celebration memorabilia7585
titlestmt.author: Compiled by Ezra Corral

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2024-01-02 00:11:52 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: Arthur S. Leonards Gay Games and Stonewall 25 celebration memorabilia
did.abstract: Programs, notices, magazines, and other material from the 1994 Gay Games in New York City; also a printed program from a presentation of the Bar of the City of New York, Committee on Lesbians and Gay Men in the Profession in honor of the 25th anniversary of the Stonewall Riot.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

defitem.label: EAD encoding:
defitem.item: Andrea HektorPeter Martinez, June 2003Ezra Corral, July 2008

bioghist.head: BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
bioghist.p: Professor of Law, New York Law School. Material also collected by Robert Rosenbaum, Munich.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Programs, notices, magazines, and other material from the 1994 Gay Games in New York City; also a printed program from a presentation of the Bar of the City of New York, Committee on Lesbians and Gay Men in the Profession in honor of the 25th anniversary of the Stonewall Riot.

relatedmaterial.head: RELATED MATERIALS
relatedmaterial.p: Barbara Neal's Gay Games memorabilia, #7584.Scott Chesney's Gay Games 94 and Stonewall 25 March memorabilia, #7583.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Arthur S. Leonard's Gay Games 94 and Stonewall 25 celebration memorabilia, #7585. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

Lesbian athletes.
Gay athletes.

Gay Games (4th ) (Location of meeting: New York, N.Y.). Date of meeting or treaty signing: 1994 :.)

did.unittitle: Official Guide to Lesbian and Gay Pride and History Month 1994--New York Pride Guide
Out from the Bar Raids, On to the Legal Battles: Lesbian and Gay Civil Rights in the aftermath of the Stonewall Riots, The Association of the Bar of the City of New York (Thursday, June 23, 1994)
Gay Games New York 1994, assorted papers and correspondence, English and German
Gay Games IV and Cultural Festival--official program--collector's edition
The Gay Games Guide--The Official Guide to all Gay Games IV and Cultural Festival Events
Front Runners New York, Inc. Pamphlet
Gay Games IV and Cultural Festival--New York City "Unity '94" Plastic Shopping Bag
